author: titan
description: ACT-R use-gated reinforcement (arch §12.3, §5.4, INV-Syn-5; PLAN_synthesis_engine_Phase2.md §2C.c). Formalizes Phase 1's record_access path under a signed contract: when synthesis_worker observes MEMORY_RETRIEVAL_USED for an item that the LLM actually cited (`used_by_llm = true`), increment the item's activation_state access log. Phase 1 shipped this as hardcoded Python in synthesis_worker.synthesis_worker_main; Phase 2 makes it Maker-tunable + chain-anchored (the contract IS the rule that defines what 'use-gated reinforcement' means; Maker can refine the gate without code change). The action's only side effect is calling ActivationStore.record_access(item_id, ts) — both fields read from ctx.
